Note: The holding registers can be managed via the following Modbus commands: “Read Holding Registers”, “Write Single Register” or “Write Multiple Registers”.
The free Sentera configuration and monitoring software 3SModbus can be downloaded via: https://www.sentera.eu/en/3SMCenter
